name: Cryptographic Security Verification Grimoire
description: Expert procedure for verifying cryptographic vulnerabilities. Tests for signature malleability, ecrecover issues, replay attacks, weak randomness, and hash collision risks.
author: VKG Team
graph_queries: FIND functions WHERE uses_ecrecover = true AND NOT checks_sig_s = true
FIND functions WHERE uses_ecrecover = true AND NOT checks_zero_address = true
FIND functions WHERE uses_block_hash = true OR uses_block_timestamp = true

steps.name: Check Crypto Properties
steps.description: Query VKG for cryptographic vulnerability indicators

steps.name: Analyze Signature Validation
steps.description: Check if signatures are properly validated

verdict_rules.explanation: ecrecover can return zero address on invalid signature - not checked
Signature malleability - s value not checked to be in lower half
No replay protection - signatures can be reused across chains/contracts
Using block values for randomness - manipulable by miners/validators
abi.encodePacked with dynamic types - hash collision possible
